role_summary: the systems auditor evaluates it systems, controls,  and processes to ensure data integrity,  security, and operational effectiveness.
responsibilities: • audit it systems and application controls   • review access controls, data security, and system integrity   • evaluate it general controls and automated process es  • assess system risks and recommend improvements   • coordinate with it teams and management   • prepare system audit reports
qualifications: • ca with systems audit experience   • knowledge of it controls and erp systems   • analytical and technical mindset
